meta.title: Japanese Afternoon Tea Lunch ｜ LOCAL EXPERIENCE ｜ Japan Ishikawa Pref. Japanese inn (Ryokan) Onsen Hanamurasaki

sections.body: LOCAL EXPERIENCE TOUR PAGE Japanese Afternoon Tea Lunch – Experience the elegance of Japanese flavors Time : 11:30〜／12:00〜／12:30〜 Price : ¥6,000 per person Capacity : 2 to 4 people Enjoy a serene afternoon at Hanamurasaki with our exclusive Japanese-style afternoon tea. This thoughtfully curated experience features delicate vegetable sushi, seasonal wagashi (Japanese sweets), and a selection of premium Japanese teas. Each element is crafted to highlight the beauty of Japanese culinary tradition while offering a moment of pure relaxation. Unwind in a tranquil setting as you savor the delicate balance of flavors, textures, and aromas. This experience is a perfect blend of modern refinement and timeless tradition, designed to be enjoyed at a leisurely pace.
